item.title: When a transport driver makes a very poor decision
item.description: Not every moment on the road goes to plan — especially when a transport driver makes a series of questionable calls behind the wheel. A frustrating watch for anyone who values road safety. Have you ever witnessed something like this?

media:content.media:title: When a transport driver makes a very poor decision
media:content.media:description: Not every moment on the road goes to plan — especially when a transport driver makes a series of questionable calls behind the wheel. A frustrating watch for anyone who values road safety. Have you ever witnessed something like this?

item.title: Our Average Car Lasts 17 Days… Not This One
item.description: Most cars don’t stick around long, but this one defied the odds. What makes it so different, and why did it last far beyond the average?

media:content.media:title: Our Average Car Lasts 17 Days… Not This One
media:content.media:description: Most cars don’t stick around long, but this one defied the odds. What makes it so different, and why did it last far beyond the average?

item.title: In 23 Years I Have NEVER Seen Car Brands Do This
item.description: Decades in the auto world reveal plenty of surprises—but this move by car brands is unlike anything seen before. What shocking change is shaking up the industry?

media:content.media:title: In 23 Years I Have NEVER Seen Car Brands Do This
media:content.media:description: Decades in the auto world reveal plenty of surprises—but this move by car brands is unlike anything seen before. What shocking change is shaking up the industry?

item.title: NEVER Say These Phrases at a Car Dealership!
item.description: Some words give dealers the upper hand and can cost you thousands. What phrases should you avoid on the lot, and how can you keep control of the deal?

media:content.media:title: NEVER Say These Phrases at a Car Dealership!
media:content.media:description: Some words give dealers the upper hand and can cost you thousands. What phrases should you avoid on the lot, and how can you keep control of the deal?

item.title: Who’s About to Ruin My Photo Shoot?
item.description: The perfect shot is lined up—until someone steps in at the wrong moment. What unexpected twist nearly ruined this photo shoot?

media:content.media:title: Who’s About to Ruin My Photo Shoot?
media:content.media:description: The perfect shot is lined up—until someone steps in at the wrong moment. What unexpected twist nearly ruined this photo shoot?

item.title: Extended Warranties Stop Shop Markups
item.description: Dealerships often push pricey markups, but extended warranties can flip the script. How do they protect your wallet and stop hidden costs from sneaking in?

media:content.media:title: Extended Warranties Stop Shop Markups
media:content.media:description: Dealerships often push pricey markups, but extended warranties can flip the script. How do they protect your wallet and stop hidden costs from sneaking in?
